summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Aurum Quant premium fintech landing page. Tested all major features including hero section, KPI cards, equity curve chart, trading strategy overview, recent trades table, FAQ accordion, email form, and responsive design. Overall excellent performance with minor UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Click events intercepted by overlay elements, preventing navigation link clicks
Widget button may not be properly rendered or positioned for interaction
ui_bugs.selector: Fixed positioned button at bottom right

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu button not easily accessible or properly structured
Pagination buttons present but interaction needs refinement for smoother UX

design_issues.issue: Navigation overlay prevents clicking - likely z-index or pointer-events issue

passed_tests: Hero section displays key trading stats (+67.4% return, 64.8% win rate, 2.14 profit factor, 8.2% max drawdown)
KPI cards section with 81 animated counter elements working properly
Equity curve chart renders correctly with Recharts integration
Chart shows growth trajectory from $10k to $16.7k with proper data visualization
Strategy overview 6-step flow cards display properly
Recent trades table shows trade data with proper formatting
FAQ accordion functionality working - questions expand/collapse properly
Footer email form accepts input and shows success message
Responsive design works across desktop/tablet/mobile viewports
Smooth scrolling and scroll-triggered animations functioning
Mobile card layout for trades table displays correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix navigation overlay issues preventing clicks on header links. Consider adjusting z-index values or pointer-events CSS properties. Improve mobile navigation accessibility and floating widget positioning. These are minor UI polish issues - core functionality is working excellently.
success_percentage: Frontend: 90% - Excellent performance with minor interaction issues
